title: Red Foliage
description: A Resource Pack for making plants red
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78c7ee32e4b775094fcd71fa9d75b91950ec98f2_0.webp)

Added All Flowers, crops, leaves, moss, vines, etc.
Yellow Birch Leaves and Red/Orange Spruce Leaves!
 

Have Fun with my RP!

P.s.
Best to use a shader and make the screen colors also red-ish ;)

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
